title: Code Factory: Proof-by-Sabotage Software Factory
description:
Code Factory is a local-first, open-source workflow for turning specifications, behavior checks, design-token contracts, policy verification, and release receipts into auditable software delivery. Version 0.14 adds a deterministic target compiler for worker, web, Expo mobile, and supervised agent-UI starters, plus a loopback-only Factory Studio opened through confirmed VS Code and JetBrains actions. Generated targets begin blocked and carry governance manifests, SSAT contracts, smoke hooks, Mermaid maps, and source-bound receipts. This source release includes its public documentation assets and Mermaid diagrams.

Evidence boundary: the compiler and Studio make no model calls and do not grant deployment, publication, signing, connector, credential, or external-message authority. Generated web, mobile, and agent-UI products may add models later and still require product-specific tests and human release review. A passing receipt does not prove an arbitrary production environment.

Dual licensed under MIT or Apache-2.0.
